world.title: Trade Setup For June 1: Nifty Support Sinks to 23,350 Post-Crash; GIFT Nifty Signals Red Start
world.description: Analysts have warned that any sustainable move below the support zone of 23,350 could result in Nifty slipping to 23,200.

world.title: MSI stuck a holographic AI capsule to its new desktop
world.description:
Not to be outdone by Razer’s waifu capsule, MSI says it has a whole desktop “that doesn’t just run games — it responds, adapts, and engages.” Sigh! The company isn’t telling us how much it’ll cost, or if it’s a real product, but hints you can change out the LuckyClaw avatar for other third-party ones.
[Image: https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/05/slack-upload-1780243833276.png?quality=90&strip=all]
[Image: https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/05/slack-upload-1780243819675.png?quality=90&strip=all]

world.title: 200,000 temporary jobs to support school readiness under TUPAD program
world.description: THE Department of Labor and Employment (DOLE) will provide more than 200,000 temporary jobs under its Tulong Panghanapbuhay sa Ating Disadvantaged Workers (Tupad) program.

world.title: Joe ‘Ferrari’ Sibanyoni, co-accused drop interdict application to stop arrest
world.description: Mpumalanga taxi boss Joe “Ferrari” Sibanyoni and his co-accused, Oupa “Bafana” Sindane, have withdrawn their urgent application to interdict the police from executing warrants of arrest against them.

world.title: West Coast town exploring community options for residential healthcare
world.description: The tiny town of Reefton, on the South Island's West Coast, has decided to take matters into its own hands after losing a critical residential healthcare unit in 2022.

world.title: Evacuation alert issued for communities along Lardeau River, Duncan River, surrounding tributaries
world.description: An evacuation alert is still in effect for the communities along the Lardeau River, Duncan River and the surrounding tributaries due to rising water levels.

world.title: Apple is already working on iOS 28, macOS 28
world.description: Apple is already developing its 2027 updates for iOS 28, iPadOS 28, macOS 28, and its other operating systems. This is entirely unsurprising.
